leadText: The White Apricorn (Japanese: しろぼんぐり White Bonguri), formatted Wht Apricorn prior to Generation VI, is a type of Apricorn introduced in Generation II. It can be used to make a Fast Ball.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The White Apricorn can be made into a Fast Ball by Kurt . If used in the Apriblender , it can produce a flavorless Aprijuice that has no effect.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C A white Apricorn . HG SS B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A white Apricorn. It doesn't smell like anything. S V A white Apricorn. It doesn’t have any aroma at all.
